name: Cookies and Tracking
text: The platform may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance the user experience and collect usage data. Cookies are small data files stored on the user's device. Users may control cookie settings through their browser preferences. The platform uses: (a) essential cookies necessary for the operation of the service; (b) analytics cookies to understand usage patterns; and (c) preference cookies to remember user settings. Users may opt out of non-essential cookies at any time. Processing of data collected through cookies is governed by this Privacy Policy and applicable Indian law.
invalid_if: No opt-out mechanism is provided for non-essential cookies
